headline: Zscaler Q3 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: ZS' Q3 beat on EPS and revenues as Zero Trust demand and larger enterprise deals lift ARR, RPO and prompt higher FY26 guidance.

headline: APPS Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Shares Rise

headline: Semtech's Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
